basic_details.job_title: ICAR IVRI Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI) Young Professional-II Walk-in Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR IVRI Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters' degree in Veterinary Science / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Bacteriology / Virology / Immunology or Life Sciences
qualification.details: Masters' degree in Veterinary Science / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Bacteriology / Virology / Immunology or Life Sciences

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR IVRI Young Professional-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-II post at ICAR IVRI is scheduled for 24th June 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Veterinary Science, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Bacteriology, Virology, Immunology, or Life Sciences to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional-II post is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-II position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 42,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the type of job and tenure for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: The job is contractual in nature. Further details regarding the tenure can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ICAR Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI) located in Nainital, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of their ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-II post at ICAR IVRI.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.
